proposals.description: "organism-alpha-bot" escalates to humans in 99% of cycles — response should be automated
proposals.suggestion: Create a new bot or protocol to handle this escalation class automatically. Consider: "Create organism-risk-bot to pre-screen high-risk PRs from organism-alpha-bot."

proposals.description: Rule "BLOCK_SECRETS" has never triggered in 1560 cycles — verify condition or consider removing if obsolete
proposals.suggestion: Test rule "BLOCK_SECRETS" with a synthetic event. If unreachable, remove or simplify its condition.
